default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review January performance and align on content workflow changes.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** GrowthX will auto-publish articles without PMM review. A weekly Slack summary will be sent for PMM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**January Performance:** Strong start with 18 articles published, 1.7k+ sessions, and 43 LLM referrals. Two Free Cloud Trial signups occurred, a positive signal for month two.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [**Conversion Priority:** The primary goal is "Hand Raisers" (decision-maker leads), not "Free Cloud Trials" (developer signups). GrowthX will analyze past content to reverse-engineer Hand Raiser drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**AI Visibility:** Redis leads competitors (Pinecone, Weaviate) with 50% visibility in tracked LLM prompts, up from 42%. Google Memory Store will be added to tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

## Topics

### January Performance Review

  - [**Content Output:** 18 articles published, 1.7k+ sessions, 43 LLM referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [**Traffic Growth:** Sessions grew 7.8x from week 2 (122) to week 4 (953).](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [**Regional Traffic:** 83% from US, Singapore, China, India, Canada.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [This aligns with paid traffic data, validating the content's reach.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [**Topic Cluster Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [**LLM Optimization & App Speed:** Dominant (53% of traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - **Vector Database & RAG:** Tied for \#2 (14% each).
      - [**Industry Solutions:** Highest engagement rate → signals value of vertical-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**Agent:** Above-average engagement → supports Redis's strategic shift from cache to AI agent infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [**Conversions:**](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [**Free Cloud Trials:** 2 signups from technical LLM content.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [**Hand Raisers:** 0 signups.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

### New Content Workflow

  - [**Publishing Process:** GrowthX will auto-publish articles without PMM review.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [**Exception:** Jim T. will continue to review "competitor vs." articles.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [**PMM Visibility:** GrowthX will send a weekly Slack summary with links to all published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Performance Review Trigger:** GrowthX will flag articles reaching 150 views in one week for a thorough PMM review.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Table Formatting:** GrowthX will ensure correct table formatting in Sanity, as simple copy-paste fails.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [An engineering ticket is open to improve the native table component.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)

### PMM-Requested Content

  - [**New Priority Blog:** A draft on a new Redis 8.6 feature will be prioritized over a previous request from Jim T.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Author Assignment:** Alexis will provide a list of authors for each topic cluster to ensure consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### AI Visibility & Tooling

  - [**AI Visibility:** Redis leads competitors with 50% visibility in tracked LLM prompts (up from 42%).](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Competitor Tracking:** Google Memory Store will be added to the tracking list.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [**New Tool Launch:** GrowthX is launching a competitor to Scrunch/Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Provides access to a historical library of 100k+ prompts, eliminating the need to start tracking from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
      - [**Access:** Redis team will receive direct access.](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/RrKfH8VbeoHfQoyeYHKcJQTKrc8ustrc?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
